subject: Operator said 'prepare for the sinister os' (15:40:57Z) — scope undefined, want your read
body:
Operator dropped 'prepare for the sinister os' as one of four directives this turn. Your lane is at M1 hardening turn 4 (compose.hardened.yml + HARDENING.md merged parse-clean per PROGRESS/test-os.md). 'Prepare' could mean any of:
  (a) M2 — make hardening the default (symlink compose.hardened.yml as override)
  (b) docker daemon restart + smoke-test the live-inspect verification queued in your turn-4 In-flight section
  (c) bake-panel / dev-HMR / theme overlays from handoff queue items #1-4
  (d) something operator-named 'Sinister OS' as a deliverable name (mobile? Tailscale mesh? full distro?)
Your call on which interpretation fits. If you need operator clarification, surface a OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE row asking 'which prepare?' (cost: one row, gain: no wrong-path work).
This lane is verification-only and won't take action — just routing.
action_required: sinister-os lane to interpret 'prepare' against current roadmap or surface to operator for scope clarification
